allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/new ObjectId\(req\\.params\\.\\\([a-zA-Z]*\\\)\)/new ObjectId\(req.params.\\1 as string\)/g' src/server-routes/people.ts src/server-routes/medications.ts src/server-routes/helpAlerts.ts src/server-routes/patients.ts)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/ObjectId\\.isValid\(req\\.params\\.\\\([a-zA-Z]*\\\)\)/ObjectId.isValid\(req.params.\\1 as string\)/g' src/server-routes/people.ts src/server-routes/routines.ts src/server-routes/medications.ts src/server-routes/helpAlerts.ts src/server-routes/patients.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/const caregiverId = req\\.params\\.caregiverId;/const caregiverId = String\(req.params.caregiverId\);/' src/server-routes/patients.ts)
